description.en: Automatically determine how many times to call timeit(). This is a convenience function that calls timeit() repeatedly so that the total time >= 0.2 second, returning the eventual (number of loops, time taken for that number of loops). It calls timeit() with increasing numbers from the sequence 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, … until the time taken is at least 0.2 seconds. If callback is given and is not None, it will be called after each trial with two arguments: callback(number, time_taken). Added in ...
